phrases.intent_en: Ask where the departure bay is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme dónde están los andenes de salida?
phrases.pronunciation: Poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh es-TAHN los ahn-DEH-nehs deh sah-LEE-dah?

likely_response.local: Los andenes están al fondo del pasillo.
likely_response.pronunciation: LOHS ahn-DEH-nehs EHSTÁN AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
likely_response.translation_en: The bays are at the end of the hall.

responses.english: The bays are at the end of the hall.
responses.phonetic: LOHS ahn-DEH-nehs EHSTÁN AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
responses.french: Los andenes están al fondo del pasillo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the next bus to El Puerto leaves
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cuándo sale el próximo bus a El Puerto de Santa María?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KOOÁN-doh SAH-leh EHL PRÓ-ksee-moh BOOS AH EHL poo-EHR-toh DEH SAHN-tah mah-RÍ-ah

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the departure board.

responses.english: It is indicated on the departure board.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de billetes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh bee-YEH-tes?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the lobby, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the lobby, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay consigna de equipajes aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿AHY kohn-SEE-nyah deh eh-kee-PAH-khehs ah-KEE?

likely_response.translation_en: In the lobby, next to the exit.

responses.english: In the lobby, next to the exit.
